title: Luffy Battles Cracker
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Cracker, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Luffy fights one of Big Mom’s Sweet Commanders while the rescue mission grows more dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Cracker
dialogue.text: I am cracker the Biscuit Knight!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Pretzel" is the name of my trusty blade!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A clash against not only a yonko executive... but a man with a bounty of over 8 hundred million

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How did he grow those extra arms?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is an unique weapon that has no peer!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even his self- proclaimed one-of-a- kind sword multiplied!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I shall baptise you with a "new world cleansing"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's fall back for now, Luffy!! This guy is probably one of the executives !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You've given yourself no where to run!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 21 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
